chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-121 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.2791/2019 27-05-2019 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for the petitioner Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for respondent No.1 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, A.A.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner while placing on record the copy of private settlement does not press this petition as the parties have entered into settlement outside the Court. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
